name: MailFlow
description: MailFlow is a modern, self-hosted email management and routing platform. It provides a clean web UI and handles email deliverability, tracking, and routing — all running via Docker Compose inside a Debian LXC container.

notes.text: MailFlow listens on HTTPS (port 443) using a self-signed certificate. Accept the browser security warning on first access.
All secrets (SESSION_SECRET, DB_PASSWORD, ENCRYPTION_KEY) are auto-generated on first install and stored in /opt/mailflow/.env.
This container is **privileged** because Docker-in-LXC requires kernel namespacing features (nesting=1, keyctl=1).
